mapper.select: select count(*) num from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name w2, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.final_sheet_num) w4, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num) w5, tia_alarm_dict.txt w8, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num) W9, (100-round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num)*100),2))||'%' W12 from nmosdb.tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum, nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.sum_level= #{sum_level} and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_id in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.network_type_top = tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type = 1001 and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.send_rule ='专业' group by tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name,tia_alarm_dict.txt )

select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name w2, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.final_sheet_num) w4, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num) w5, tia_alarm_dict.txt w8, sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num) W9, (100-round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.notnull_sheet_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.total_alarm_num)*100),2))||'%' W12 from nmosdb.tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum, nmosdb.tia_alarm_dict tia_alarm_dict where tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.sum_level= #{sum_level} and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_id in (${province}) or '-1' in (${province})) and (tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.Region_id in (${region_id}) or '-1' in (${region_id})) and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.network_type_top = tia_alarm_dict.id and tia_alarm_dict.type = 1001 and tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.send_rule ='专业' group by tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_ssr_jt_sum.ne_name,tia_alarm_dict.txt )a ) Where m_rowNum > #{BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= #{EndIndex}
select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual
select distinct province_id id,province_name txt from region_city order by province_name
select distinct region_id id,region_name txt from region_city where (province_id in (${province_id}) or '-1' in (${province_id})) order by region_name

select count(*) num from (select tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result first_result, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g1 g1, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g2 g2, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g3 g3, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g4 g4, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g5 g5 from (select tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result first_result, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.nms_name g1, meta_objects.ZH_NAME g2, eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_label g3, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.alarm_title_text g4, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.alarm_num g5 from tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum left join (select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects on tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_object_class=meta_objects.object_class where tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and (tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.omc_id in (${omcid}) or '-1' in (${omcid}) ) and (tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_object_class in (${eqp_object_class}) or '-1' in (${eqp_object_class}) ) and tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.sum_level=#{sum_level} order by tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.alarm_num desc) tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum where rownum <= #{rows} or '-1' = #{rows} )

select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') first_result, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g1 g1, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g2 g2, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g3 g3, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g4 g4, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.g5 g5 from (select tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result first_result, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.nms_name g1, meta_objects.ZH_NAME g2, eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_label g3, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.alarm_title_text g4, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.alarm_num g5 from tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum left join (select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects on tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_object_class=meta_objects.object_class where tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result >=to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.first_result <=to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and (tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.omc_id in (${omcid}) or '-1' in (${omcid}) ) and (tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.eqp_object_class in (${eqp_object_class}) or '-1' in (${eqp_object_class}) ) and tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.sum_level=#{sum_level} order by tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum.alarm_num desc) tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum where rownum <= #{rows} or '-1' = #{rows} )a ) Where m_rowNum > ${BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= ${EndIndex}
select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '周' as txt, 2 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual
select distinct nms_name as txt,omc_id as id from tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_sum

select '虚拟机' as txt, 508 as id from dual union all select '宿主机' as txt, 1521 as id from dual union all select '物理机' as txt, 502 as id from dual union all select '交换机' as txt, 905 as id from dual union all select '防火墙' as txt, 901 as id from dual union all select '虚拟存储' as txt, 1514 as id from dual union all select '应用' as txt, 506 as id from dual union all select '服务' as txt, 1520 as id from dual

select count(*) num from ( select tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.first_result a_cloumn_00, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.nms_name a_cloumn_01, meta_objects.ZH_NAME a_cloumn_02, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.eqp_label a_cloumn_03, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.org_severity a_cloumn_04, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.alarm_title_text a_cloumn_05, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.event_time a_cloumn_06, tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.cancel_time a_cloumn_07 from tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail,(select ZH_NAME,OBJECT_CLASS from meta_objects where object_class in(508,1521,502,905,901,1514,506,1520)) meta_objects where first_result =to_date(#{first_result},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') and eqp_object_class = #{eqp_object_class} and nms_name = #{g1} and eqp_label = #{g3} and alarm_title_text = #{g4} and tfa_alarm_cpm_hq_detail.eqp_object_class =meta_objects.object_class ${DetailWhereCondition} )
